name: Suspicious Group And Account Reconnaissance Activity
notes: This rule detects suspicious reconnaissance command line activity on Windows systems
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Group And Account Reconnaissance Activity Using Net.EXE
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Net Execution, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Group And Account Reconnaissance Activity Using Net.EXE
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious Group And Account Reconnaissance Activity on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Net Execution, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Group And Account Reconnaissance Activity Using Net.EXE
RED_list: Event name: Suspicious Group And Account Reconnaissance Activity
Event description: Detects suspicious reconnaissance command line activity on Windows systems
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
